title: Bucket'Em
description: A mod about adding more ways to store and move mobs in both buckets and non-bucket ways.
body:
Bucket'Em is a mod about adding more ways to store and move mobs in both buckets and non-bucket ways for convenience and to fill in the gaps left in vanilla regarding bucketing mobs.


# **Features:**

- Buckets for Squids, Striders, Frogs & More!

- New bottleing mechanic and bottled mobs!

- Trapping Allays and Vexes for easier transportation! 

- ~~A new potion effect helpful for seeing under lava.~~ [Feature moved to [Magma Vision mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/magma-vision).]
  
- New model updates for vanilla buckets for axolotls and tropical fish so that you can easily tell them apart.

- Stack size changes for bukcets to help organize the inventory more. 

- And much more.
  

---

- For other miscellaneous changes and features please consult the [Mod's Wiki](https://github.com/Qzimyion/BucketEm/wiki).

- And remember to join the [Discord](https://t.co/mpmPxWxzq1) for other mods and future projects and if you run into a problem. 

---

### Language Support:

| Language             | Translator               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| 🇪🇸 Spanish           | Celling (Discord)             | 
| 🇮🇹 Italian            | Eravern (Discord)              |
| 🇺🇦 Ukrainian (Partial support)           | Unroman (Github)             | 
| 🇮🇳 Hindi | Qzimyion |
| 🇩🇪 German |  Lucanoria (Github) |
| 🇷🇺 Russian |  Pansangg (Github & Discord) |

If you wish to translate the mod in your own language, feel free to join the discord server. 

---

You are free to use my mod in a modpack or a youtube video as long as you give me proper credit. :3
